title: SG Tracks
description: SG Tracks adds tracks that work like regular wheels for Create Aeronautics. You don't need any extra mounting blocks — just place the tracks directly on your machine and build your contraption.
body:
# SG Tracks

Adds simple tracks for your Create Aeronautics builds.

No extra mounts needed. Just place the tracks directly on your machine.

## Features:

- Tracks work like wheels — your vehicle can move

- No separate mounting blocks required

- Adjustable track size

## Requirements:

- Create Aeronautics

- Create 1.21.1 for NeoForge

## How to use:

### How to build a track:

1. Place a Drive Wheel at your power connection point

2. Add Support Wheels in a straight line

3. Place another Drive Wheel at the opposite end

4.  Apply rotation — the track will move

### Tools:

- Large Tool — affects the whole track at once

- Small Tool — affects only one track block

### Controls:

- Shift + Right-click on air — switch mode (Size / Suspension)

- Right-click on track — increase value

- Shift + Right-click on track — decrease value
  
- Right-click with a Create Wrench to hide the wheels
  
- Select "Reset" mode with the Large Tool and right-click on the track to reset it
  
- Select "Track Position" mode and right-click on the upper part of the track to move it



### Size rule:
If 50% or more of your Support Wheels share the same size, the entire track automatically changes to that size.

### Important:
Track load capacity depends on your contraption's mass. Heavier vehicles need more tracks or stronger suspension.

_⚠️ This mod is in beta testing. If you find a bug, please report it on Discord_
